market_overview.headline: Market shows clear bear structure with 36% of stocks in Full Bear, while Iran war tensions fuel oil spike and business activity deterioration.
market_overview.detail: Both SPY and QQQ in bearish unstacked formations with potential bullish crossovers brewing. BTC in Full Bear down 46% from fair value adds crypto weakness to the mix.

momentum_themes.headline: Energy & Defense Drive Momentum Leadership
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals sector showing 100% bullish structure as Iran war drives oil prices higher. Electronic technology and defense contractors leading momentum with 50-65% gains in top names.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Perfect, Tech Mixed, Finance Crushed

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure as Iran war drives oil prices to new highs
Industrial strength amid defense spending and infrastructure themes
Mixed tech showing pockets of strength in semiconductors and defense electronics

weakest.note: Banking sector crushed as rate cut expectations and geopolitical risks weigh
Software and cloud names in deep bear structure amid valuation reset
Business services completely bearish as economic uncertainty rises

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into defensive energy and materials as geopolitical risks dominate. Finance sector particularly weak despite potential rate benefits.

items.text: 36% of market in Full Bear structure — broad deterioration beyond normal correction
Iran war driving oil spike and business activity to 11-month lows
Both SPY and QQQ in bearish formations — major indices vulnerable to breakdown
Financial sector 80% bearish despite potential rate benefits — credit concerns emerging

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran war tensions dominated as Trump announced negotiations while markets priced in extended Middle East conflict. Oil traders bet $500M just before Trump's Iran delay announcement, while business surveys showed activity slipping to 11-month lows amid geopolitical uncertainty.

items.text: Iran war negotiations and potential pause driving oil volatility and defense sector strength
US business activity hits 11-month low as geopolitical tensions weigh on economic outlook
Strait of Hormuz disruption fears keeping energy sector in full bull mode
Trump approval rating hits 36% low as fuel prices surge amid Iran conflict
Massive oil options bets placed before Trump's Iran delay announcement raise questions
